violations.text: Hot dog receiving temperatures observed at 99 - 103 degrees F. Hot dogs were sent back to the high school for reheating. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2026

The receiving door is not tight-fitting. Space observed at the bottom of the door. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2026
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dishwasher. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2026

The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dishwasher. Thermo labels or internal temperature indicating device must be obtained. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/27/2025

The 1st hot-holding unit was observed in poor repair in the service line area. Equipment components such as doors, seals, hinges, fasteners, and kick plates shall be kept intact, tight, and adjusted in accordance with manufacturer's specifications. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2025

The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine in the kitchen. Establishment is to obtain thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device. New Violation. Correct By: 04/04/2025
The condensate from the 1 door true refrigeration unit is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 10/20/2023
